product.title: IS'MINE White Liquid Foundation Makeup, Matte Flawless Finish Foundation, Vegan & Cruelty-Free (1.05 Fl Oz, 041)
featureBullets: Color: White (Liquid foundation, face & body paint), net weight: 30g/1.05 fl.oz
Texture: liquid, which makes apply smooth and easy, feel light during the whole day, very easy to apply on face or on body, mostly easy to remove to protect your skin.
Suitable: suit for all skin, but more suitable for combination or oily skin to control oil absorption and shine.
Long Lasting: suggest to use a makeup powder or setting spray for makeup setting, so it will be long lasting and prevent makeup loss.
Occasion: Suitable for cosplay or halloween, stage makeup, clown makeup or any other occasion you will need white, special FX products.

Notice: This bottle is a vacumn pump bottle, so there is no straw as other ordinary bottle, need to press several times to push the air out first, then the liquid will come out. No need tube going down into the product to suck it up into the pumper like ordinary bottle. All bottle is without tube, not few poor assembly, Kindly notice.

specification.value: #43,806 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #383 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation amazing for cosplay, with good coverage that works well even on darker skin tones. Moreover, the product lasts all day and is shockingly good for its price. However, the application and texture receive mixed feedback - while many say it applies smoothly and has a smooth texture, one customer notes it becomes cakey.

reviews.reviewTitle: SENSORY ISSUE GOTHS. LISTEN TO ME.
reviews.reviewText: so i never leave reviews HOWEVER this was so good i just had to let the world know.. i pair this with a white blurring setting powder and it's actually so life changing as an autistic person who loves doing creative makeup looks.. i've been looking for a white foundation that is sensory friendly, long lasting, decent quality at least, and affordable. this is ALL OF THAT. as i write this i'm wearing it and have been for the last 22 hours. it still look as it did when i put it on. it feels like i'm wearing nothing at all, unlike so many other white foundations and face paints.. so many feel heavy and you can just FEEL it on your face but not this one, this one is so lightweight i forget i'm wearing anything. it barely transfers, i could touch my face and it wouldn't get on my hands. and if you've used these kinds of things before you know pure white in general tends to look cakey no matter what.. but this is the first time i've used one where it didn't look cakey at all, it was so smooth looking especially with the setting powder.. it functioned as a normal lightweight foundation would. so pigmented.. it didn't melt out in the hot sun.. and with setting powder it dries completely. i can not recommend this enough i adore this foundation SO MUCH.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 13, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Fantastic white base! I bought this on a whim because I needed it for last minute dis de los muertos looks and it preformed amazing! I prepped our skin with very hydrating products and use the nyx glue primer and it was a perfect base for this foundation and lasted all night for us and didn’t crack or separate. Blended really well and layered easily.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 19, 2025

reviews.reviewText: It works pretty well, it layers well and I usually only do 1 or 2 layers for my face to be completely white. It's not thick and I don't feel it on my face, it's easy to wash off too and doesn't stain or anything. I'm not sure if this is a problem on my end with my primer or setting powder, but it does crust and pick up around the nose or on the nose during just the first hour of use.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 13, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Seeing is believing. I went in blindly. I trusted the positive reviews. #WINNING!!! This foundation is a miracle! As a stage actor, makeup artist and cosplayer, I am beyond astounded by this amazing Amazon find. Paired with a white setting powder, this base foundation looks and feels too good to be true. It goes on silky and smoooooooth!! Not like traditional stage makeup. It’s like wearing a daily but far more dramatically!! Its staying power is incredible!! It set on my face without melting, flaking, drying out my skin… even under various lighting, in a hot room, sweating for 6+ hours!! (See posted pic) Note, outcome may have been due to use in combination a clean face, moisture, setting spray and primer. Also, don’t judge the pic too harshly, I’m over 50 and the fact it didn’t flake or settle into the various laugh lines and crows feet makes me want to replace everyone’s white base makeup with this one!! Even upon removal, my skin was no worse for wear! It was unbelievably easy to remove, didn’t dry out my skin sensitive skin. It did not cause any break outs, rashes or other terrible possible outcomes. You know!! Things one might commonly associate with such a seemingly random bit of makeup. I’m a new forever fan. If this stuff turns out to be made from tears of a thousand virgin white mythical unicorns, I would still wear it and no! I’m not condoning any animal cruelty! If it’s a knock off…?? Honestly it wouldn’t matter! This stuff is the answer to anyone seeking a liquid white foundation!! (NO I WAS NOT BRIBED TO TYPE THIS!!)
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 6, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Great coverage and a lot of product. I’m wearing it right now. Light feeling on the face I can’t only really feel it when it’s super layered or on the middle of my fore head where I wrinkle most. Other makeup goes on top great. It does show a decent amount of my skin texture but it’s not that bad and you can’t tell from far so I don’t mind. My favorite non expensive white foundation I’ve tried so far. Better than any Halloween makeup foundations. Also not irritating which is amazing because regular foundation irritates me. Try it now!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 20, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Not great if you're wanting it as actual foundation. I've tried it twice, using different methods to apply and both times it becomes cakey and overall doesnt last. Almost seems to come off as you're applying makep onto it. Luckily I was just getting it as a costume makeup so it didn't matter that much but even so, I wouldn't use it again. It also has a weird paint smell, which for something labled "foundation" i didnt expect.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 31, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I bought the white liquid foundation to use for cosplay. The bottle wasn’t real small like some other brands you buy. The make up went on her face smoothly and dried nicely. The foundation came off her face easily. The foundation covered well and did not flake. I definitely will buy this product again. The foundation came quickly and was packaged well.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 13, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I tried to use this foundation and found it really terrible. It did not blend into my skin color. It just sat on my face as white and felt like paint. Additionally the stem part of the pump was lost in the bottle or not there so I had to open the bottle to use the product. I do not recommend this at all. I am returning this item.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 16, 2025
